mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY reg_date DESC) `row_number` , id, title, reg_date, mod_date, is_published FROM about WHERE admin_id = 1 AND is_deleted = #{isDeleted}

SELECT a.*, s.*, i.*, sk.* ,a.id AS a_id ,s.id AS s_id ,i.id AS i_id ,sk.id AS sk_id ,a.title AS a_title ,s.title AS s_title ,a.name AS a_name ,sk.name AS sk_name FROM (SELECT * FROM about WHERE admin_id = 1 AND id = #{id}) a LEFT JOIN section s ON (a.id = s.about_id) LEFT JOIN image i ON (a.id = i.about_id) LEFT JOIN skill sk ON (a.id = sk.about_id)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO about (admin_id, name, title, github_url, blog_url, email_url, is_published) VALUES (1, #{name}, #{title}, #{githubUrl}, #{blogUrl}, #{emailUrl}, #{isPublished})
INSERT INTO skill (about_id, name, description) VALUES (#{aboutId}, #{name}, #{description})
INSERT section (project_id, about_id, title, content) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{aboutId}, #{title}, #{content})
INSERT image (project_id, about_id, ori_name, saved_name, extension) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{aboutId}, #{oriName}, #{savedName}, #{extension})
mapper.delete: UPDATE about SET is_published = 0 ,is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND admin_id = 1;
